title: plectranthus lucidus
intro: Plectranthus lucidus, also known as Coleus lucidus, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae, commonly found in tropical Africa. The leaves and roots of Plectranthus lucidus have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as being used to manage diabetes and hypertension. In herbal preparations, Plectranthus lucidus is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to leverage its medicinal properties.
